messages.content:
Dear Mr. Adam Raoul,

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding your recent stay at the ABC Resort. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and discomfort you and your wife experienced during your stay.

We understand that you were expecting a newly renovated room in a quiet area of the hotel, as confirmed at the time of booking. We are sorry to hear that due to an unexpected overbooking situation, you were relocated to room 304, which did not meet your expectations and caused further issues with noise and cleanliness.

We deeply regret that the room conditions and the noise from nearby parties disrupted your vacation and caused distress to your wife. It is unacceptable that the room had a damp and moldy smell, leading to her severe headaches.

Despite your complaint on the first night and the hotel's assurance of a room change, it is disappointing that no alternative accommodation was provided for the remainder of your stay. We understand how this has negatively impacted your holiday experience and your perception of the hotel.

To address this matter, we would like to offer a 50% refund of the total amount paid for your stay. Additionally, as a gesture of goodwill, we would like to provide a 10% discount on your next booking with us. Please provide any supporting documents related to your stay, such as receipts or booking confirmations, to expedite the refund process.

We appreciate your feedback and assure you that we will investigate this matter further to prevent similar occurrences in the future. We hope to restore your faith in our services and look forward to the opportunity to serve you better in the future.

Thank you for your understanding and patience.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
Customer Support Team  
Agoda

Dear Adam Raoldrim,

We sincerely apologize for the significant inconvenience and disappointment you experienced during your three-day stay at ABC Resort last week. Despite trusting the positive reviews and beautiful photos on the Agoda website and deciding to book, we are very sorry and feel responsible that your experience was entirely different from what was promised.

We deeply understand that you expected a quiet and newly renovated room, but due to unexpected overbooking, you were assigned to room 304 near the bar, which was old and not clean. We take seriously your report of the noisy party sounds and music late into the night, and the damp, moldy smell in the room that caused your wife to suffer from severe headaches. The situation where you had to stay in an uncomfortable environment for the entire duration of your stay, despite raising a complaint on the first night and the hotel's failure to fulfill their promise to move you to another room, is unacceptable. We sincerely apologize once again for ruining your valuable vacation.

To compensate for the unpleasant and disappointing experience you had, we propose to refund 50% of the accommodation fee for your stay at ABC Resort. Additionally, we would like to offer a 10% discount for your next booking as a gesture of goodwill, hoping you will trust and use Agoda again.

To expedite the refund process and conduct a thorough investigation into the service quality at ABC Resort, we request some evidence. If you have photos or videos specifically showing the cleanliness of room 304 (e.g., dirty areas), spaces with a moldy smell, or outdated facilities, we would appreciate it if you could send them to us. Also, if you have any records of communication with the hotel regarding the room change promise at check-in or after raising a complaint on the first night (e.g., message records, call summaries), sharing them with us would greatly assist in resolving the issue.
ok noted. I'll share you details as quickly as possible. thanks
(System: Email consultation ended) This was Agent 000. Have a nice day. [Survey Link]

summary.main_inquiry: Complaints about room conditions and service at ABC Resort
key_responses: Offer of 50% refund for the stay
Request for supporting documents to expedite the refund
summary.summary: The customer expressed dissatisfaction with their stay at ABC Resort due to overbooking and poor room conditions, which led to discomfort and health issues. The agent apologized and offered compensation in the form of a partial refund and a future discount. The customer agreed to provide further documentation to support the refund process.
